title: Security Guards
description: Guard, patrol, or monitor premises to prevent theft, violence, or infractions of rules. May operate x-ray and metal detector equipment.

tasks.text: Lock doors and gates of entrances and exits to secure buildings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Patrol industrial or commercial premises to prevent and detect signs of intrusion and ensure security of doors, windows, and gates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to medical emergencies by administering basic first aid or by obtaining assistance from paramedics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Circulate among visitors, patrons, or employees to preserve order and protect property.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and authorize entrance and departure of employees, visitors, and other persons to guard against theft and maintain security of premises.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write reports of daily activities and irregularities, such as equipment or property damage, theft, presence of unauthorized persons, or unusual occurrences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Warn persons of rule infractions or violations, and apprehend or evict violators from premises, using force when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer telephone calls to take messages, answer questions, and provide information during non-business hours or when switchboard is closed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Call police or fire departments in cases of emergency, such as fire or presence of unauthorized persons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate detecting devices to screen individuals and prevent passage of prohibited articles into restricted areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect and adjust security systems, equipment, or machinery to ensure operational use and to detect evidence of tampering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Escort or drive motor vehicle to transport individuals to specified locations or to provide personal protection.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and adjust controls that regulate building systems, such as air conditioning, furnace, or boiler.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
